scripts.build: npm run build -w @operator-dock/protocol && npm run build -w @operator-dock/shared && npm run build -w @operator-dock/daemon
scripts.test: npm run build -w @operator-dock/protocol && npm run build -w @operator-dock/shared && npm run test -w @operator-dock/protocol && npm run test -w @operator-dock/daemon && swift test --package-path apps/mac && swift test --package-path apps/helper
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @operator-dock/protocol && npm run typecheck -w @operator-dock/shared && npm run typecheck -w @operator-dock/daemon
